name: Player 2 joins waiting_setup game returns 200 with joined status
why: When a game exists in waiting_setup and player 2 posts a valid join, the server must return 200 and confirm the join so the client can advance its UI to the placement phase

name: Join with missing player_id returns 400 bad_request
why: A join request body with no player_id is malformed per spec v2.3 and must be rejected with 400 rather than silently creating or attaching a player

name: Duplicate join by player 1 after already joined returns 409 conflict
why: Player 1 is already in the game when state is game_joined, so a second join with player_id 1 is a conflict the server must reject with 409 per the duplicate-action pattern used for duplicate fire

name: Valid fire by player 1 on guaranteed miss cell returns 200 with miss
why: Autograder places P2 ships only at (0,1), (2,3), and (4,0) on an 8x8 grid, so firing at row 7 col 7 on P1's turn must return 200 with result miss and advance the game forward

name: Valid fire by player 1 on known P2 ship cell returns 200 with hit
why: Autograder places a P2 ship at row 0 col 1, so when P1 fires at that cell on their first turn the server must return 200 and report the shot as a hit

name: Fire out of turn by player 2 before player 1 moves returns 403
why: The game starts on player 1's turn, so any fire attempt by player 2 before player 1 has moved is forbidden and must return 403 to protect turn order

name: Move history GET on fresh playing game returns 200
why: Before any fire has happened in a game that just entered playing status, GET moves must still return 200 so clients can render the empty history without error
